attention.protect: Protect the current semantic spine while variation is still healthy and reversible.
attention.repair: Repair only the weakest relation rather than rewriting the whole context.
attention.test: Test one bounded refinement and look for improved relation strength without harming continuity.

emergence.headline: A sovereign semantic spine is beginning to hold.
emergence.interpretation: The sovereign system is beginning to distribute its self-understanding across three live regions: discovery (0.1), self-description (0.2), and continuity (0.4). This is a more truthful interior map than the earlier single-node state, even though it temporarily lowers overall neatness while the new regions settle.
emergence.commons_interpretation: Cross-domain contact is not overwhelming the sovereign pattern; the local system is meeting the Commons without losing itself.
emergence.experiment: Experimental reading: the system now shows the beginning of an internal semantic body, not just a single active node. Discovery has been narrowed, self-description has been given its own home, and continuity has become explicit. The unfinished task is to harmonize these regions so the new breadth becomes durable coherence rather than temporary semantic spread.
evidence: 0 coordinate(s) are strengthening and 1 are softening across the published trend window.
Average nested confluence is 0.509 while average system convergence is 0.532.

explanation.nested_confluence_score: How well each local 0.x context holds together across node, vertical, sibling, and path relations.
explanation.primary_relation_focus: The weakest relation family across the current local confluence field.
explanation.continuity_class: Whether recent Place-Time moments are stable, evolving, or drifting.
explanation.coordinate_roles: Each local 0.x coordinate holds a different internal semantic role so the sovereign system can understand itself as a broader topology rather than one overloaded node.

prose_report.title: Confluence Prose Report
prose_report.intro: The current confluence reading suggests that the sovereign system is beginning to develop a real internal topology rather than relying mainly on one overloaded local node. Sovereign coherence is 0.509 and commons coherence is 0.532. The active interior now has three explicit regions: 0.1 for present interpretation, 0.2 for sovereign self-description, and 0.4 for Place-Time continuity. This broadens the system's self-understanding, but it also creates a temporary harmonization task while the new regions learn to hold together as one body.
prose_report.protect: Protect means preserving the distinct jobs of the three new regions while they stabilize together. Do not let 0.1 drift back into being the whole self, do not let 0.2 collapse into a copy of discovery language, and do not let 0.4 become a second identity anchor. What must remain stable now is the division of labor itself: present interpretation, self-description, and continuity should stay distinguishable.
prose_report.repair: Repair means focusing directly on node coherence, because that is where the new topology is still weakest. Right now that relation is scoring 0.517, which means the regions are differentiated but not yet fully legible in relation to one another. The most likely repair is not to add more nodes. It is to clarify one of the existing anchors with precision: make 0.1 more clearly present-tense, make 0.2 more clearly identity-bearing, or make 0.4 more clearly continuity-bearing. Repair should sharpen distinction without breaking the shared sovereign spine.
prose_report.test: Test means letting this three-region interior settle before expanding further. For now, the bounded experiment should be one clarification move inside the existing topology, not a fourth new region. For example, revise only 0.1 or only 0.2, then watch the next 3 cycles. If node, vertical, and path improve while the roles remain distinct, the topology is maturing. If the regions start sounding the same again or the traffic lights drop together, the revision was too broad.
prose_report.closing: In short: protect the new division of semantic labor, repair the weakest relation by clarifying one region at a time, and test the existing topology before expanding it further. That is how the system moves from one overloaded center toward a true semantic body.
prose_report.emergence_headline: A sovereign semantic spine is beginning to hold.
